Bash(cd /c/AgroConnect && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T postgres psql -U agroconnect -d agroconnect -c "
-- Verde Açores provider profile
SELECT id, user_id, company_name FROM provider_profiles WHERE user_id = 7;

-- Simulating the JPQL query for released payout
SELECT COALESCE\(SUM\(t.provider_payout\), 0\) as released_payout
FROM transactions t
JOIN proposals p ON t.proposal_id = p.id
WHERE p.provider_id = 2
AND t.status = 'RELEASED';

-- Check what the FinanceService would get
SELECT pp.id as profile_id, pp.user_id, u.id as user_table_id, u.email
FROM provider_profiles pp JOIN users u ON pp.user_id = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'verdeacores@email.com';
" 2>&1)
